since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.10%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.97% · BTC +0.47% · Gold +0.84% · Nasdaq100 -1.34%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.10%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.10%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -13.13%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +5.63%, LEU +5.60%, CSCO +2.60%, HPE +2.36%, DELL +2.30%. Laggards: ISRG -13.13%, PUBM -6.46%, AMAT -5.24%, SPCX -4.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.63% at $125.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
